content.en:
Seeing that the Blue Sky Dao Ancestor hesitated and did not dare to make a move, the Wind King made a domineering declaration: "In short, the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestors, our Black Wind Mountain, are protected, if your Heavenly Emperor Palace dares to declare war, we Black Wind Mountain will fight." I just don't know, do you Heavenly Emperor Palace dare to go to war for an emperor?"

"Hmph, Wind King, this matter is not over!"

Blue Sky Dao Ancestor shook his hand and turned to leave.

This departure also means that the Heavenly Emperor Palace is unwilling to go to war for a mere emperor, after all, he is just an emperor, and he is not a supreme true ancestor, and the emperor can still cultivate other emperors when he dies.

The Heavenly Emperor Palace has ten emperors, and there are many candidate emperors, so they don't care about this loss.

If it is for the sake of a mere emperor, starting a war with Black Wind Mountain, resulting in the fall of a large number of Dao Ancestors, then it is not worth it.

It is not yet time to start a war, and there is no big interest, so there is no need to fight with Black Wind Mountain.

After the Blue Sky Dao Ancestor left.

"Thank you Wind King for your help!"

Ye Tian said gratefully.

The reason why he dared to fight with the Heavenly Emperor Palace before and dared to let his son kill the Emperor Fengyang was to inform the Wind King, and with the Wind King's guarantee, he was naturally not afraid of the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

"It's just a small thing, your son is very good, are you interested in letting him join Black Wind Mountain?"

The Wind King said with a smile.

"It's up to him to do what he wants!"

Ye Tiandao.

At this time, the Wind King looked at Ye Xingchen.

Ye Xingchen hurriedly said, "Lord Wind King, I am willing to join Black Wind Mountain!"

"Good good !!"

The Wind King was excited.

Ye Xingchen is a Supreme True Ancestor, there was a Supreme True Ancestor like Ye Tian before, but now that Ye Tian has become a Dao Ancestor, there is no Supreme True Ancestor of Black Wind Mountain.

Therefore, it is of great significance to Black Wind Mountain to win over a supreme true ancestor.

Besides, Ye Xingchen's origin is clear, and his father is the Great Heavenly King of Black Wind Mountain, this kind of genius is too suitable for Black Wind Mountain.

Soon after.

Ye Xingchen entered the Black Wind Mountain, and the Wind King personally canonized the Heavenly General for him.

The bloody generals and the Ferris generals were very ashamed to see that Ye Xingchen, the son of Ye Tian, had become a heavenly general, above them.

They also knew that they could not be promoted to the Supreme True Ancestor, so they chose to enter the Dao Ancestor realm one after another.

In fact, the invincible true ancestors of Black Wind Mountain are far more than just the bloody generals, the other invincible true ancestors are all in the legions of other heavenly kings and great kings, and those extremely mysterious invincible true ancestors and half-step domain ancestors, they probably also have legions, but they have never been exposed.

Even Ye Tian didn't know the power of Black Wind Mountain, so he didn't know how many invincible true ancestors there were in Black Wind Mountain.

Although Ye Xingchen has become a heavenly general, he can only be in charge of those generals and peak masters, and there are not many people who really manage it, such as the Heavenly King, the Great King, and the Legion True Ancestors under the command of the Invincible True Ancestor, Ye Xingchen is not qualified to govern.

The Heavenly General seems to have a high status, but in fact, he is far from being able to enter the high-level ranks of the Black Wind Mountain.

Even if Ye Tian is now the Great Heavenly King, he knows very little about it, unless he can become one of the Ten Kings of Black Wind Mountain one day, he will be qualified to know the true secrets and heritage of Black Wind Mountain.

......

Heavenly Emperor's Palace.

The death of the Emperor of Fengyang caused a turmoil in the small circle, and many Dao Ancestors were very angry, but it was only anger, and it was impossible for the three palace masters to start a war with Black Wind Mountain for the sake of a mere Emperor of Fengyang.

But Emperor Fengyang is not without a backer, he also has a family in the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and he belongs to a not small family - the Feng family!

The Feng family, where the Emperor Fengyang is located, has dozens of Dao Ancestors, among which the strongest Dao Ancestor is the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and the Emperor Fengyang has almost been cultivated by the Feng family, and it is also the hope of the Feng family.

They also counted on Emperor Fengyang to become a supreme Dao Ancestor in the future, ruling a hall and having huge power in the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

However, Emperor Fengyang died, and the Heavenly Emperor Palace did not even avenge Emperor Fengyang.

This completely made the Feng family extremely angry, but they didn't dare to make trouble in the Heavenly Emperor Palace, otherwise the three palace masters would give an order, and the Feng family would be wiped out.

At this time, the high-level leaders of the Feng family were discussing.

Presiding over the meeting is the ancestor of the Feng family, Feng Zhengde, also known as the Dragon Fei Dao Ancestor, and the body is a dragon bird containing the blood of the dragon clan.

"Fengyang is dead!"

Long Fei Dao Ancestor said in frustration.

All the Dao Ancestors were in a very bad mood, in order to cultivate the Fengyang Emperor, they were usually reluctant to spend a lot of resources on cultivation, just to be able to cultivate the Fengyang Emperor as soon as possible, but they didn't expect to get such a result in exchange.

Long Fei Dao Ancestor said again: "I contacted a supreme Dao Ancestor of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, the Heavenly Emperor Palace will not avenge Fengyang, because the other party is a person from Black Wind Mountain, Black Wind Mountain protects him, and Heavenly Emperor Palace is unwilling to go to war." But we must take revenge on this!"

"Revenge must be taken!"

Many Dao Ancestors roared angrily.

At this time, a high-ranking member of the Feng family asked: "Ancestor, it was the Terran Ye Xingchen who killed Fengyang, it is said that the other party is now the Supreme True Ancestor, and has become the Heavenly General of Black Wind Mountain, if we kill him, Black Wind Mountain will definitely be furious!"

"Black Wind Mountain is furious, is it possible that they dare to start a war with the Heavenly Emperor Palace?" Long Fei Dao Ancestor said coldly.

The high-ranking member of the Feng family stopped talking.

Long Fei Dao Ancestor said again: "Don't worry, I know what you are worried about, worried about Black Wind Mountain, worried about that Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor, and worried that the Heavenly Emperor Palace will abandon us." I can guarantee that the Feng family will take revenge, but they will not let the people of the Feng family make a move. "

"If we don't make a move, then how can we kill Ye Xingchen?"

The high-level members of the Feng family were all puzzled.

"Have you been in the Dao Mountain Realm for too long and have forgotten the situation in the Vast Sea Realm? There were a few forces that offended our Feng family, and we could use the power of the Heavenly Emperor Palace?" Long Fei Dao Ancestor reminded.

"Ancestor, you mean to kill the God Temple!"

A Dao Ancestor woke up.

"That's right, it's the Temple of Killing God!"

Long Fei Dao Ancestor nodded.

Everyone present knew about the Temple of the Killing God, a killer organization whose members were also mysterious and said to come from various major forces.

Black Wind Mountain is a bandit force, and the Killing God Temple is equally mysterious, a killer force.

Of course, the strength of the Killing God Temple is far inferior to that of Black Wind Mountain, but as long as they give the Killing God Temple a certain amount of treasures, they dare to kill anyone, even the strongest Dao Ancestor, but they only dare to kill once, and dare not kill the second time.

After all, once it is exposed, the Killing God Temple is also afraid of being implicated.

There is no such thing as endless death, and there can be no endless assassinations, that's!

If there really was such an arrogant killer force, it would have been destroyed a long time ago.

Once the Killer Temple dispatches a killer, almost ninety percent of the task is completed, and the remaining ten percent represents uncertainty, after all, there are many times when there are accidents.

For example, the Seventh Heavenly Dao Ancestor killed a Heavy Heavenly Dao Ancestor, but he didn't expect that the other party had the protection of the invincible Dao Ancestor, this situation is uncertain.

After negotiations, the Feng family decided to ask the Killing God Temple to assassinate Ye Xingchen, as for the price of assassinating the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestors, the price was too high, and their Feng family couldn't afford it.
